kits.name: chemistry-and-materials
kits.description: Chemistry and materials science workbench spanning cheminformatics, retrosynthesis, docking, quantum chemistry, molecular dynamics, and generative materials design.
kits.longDescription:
# Chemistry and Materials

A comprehensive starter kit for chemistry and materials science research that combines cheminformatics, retrosynthetic planning, molecular docking, quantum chemistry, classical and ab-initio molecular dynamics, and generative materials design.

**What you can do:**
- Plan retrosynthetic routes for organic molecules
- Search chemical and natural-product databases
- Dock small molecules against protein targets
- Run DFT, ab-initio MD, and conformer searches
- Run classical molecular dynamics with GROMACS, LAMMPS, and OpenMM
- Generate novel inorganic materials and analyze functional groups

**Ideal for:** computational chemists, medicinal chemists, materials scientists, and catalysis researchers.

agentRefs.description: Retrosynthetic planning for organic molecules.

agentMeta.name: aizynthfinder
agentMeta.description: Expert agent for retrosynthetic route planning using AiZynthFinder. Breaks down target drug-like molecules into purchasable precursors using neural-network-guided MCTS with USPTO reaction templates.

agentRefs.description: Molecular docking of small-molecule ligands to protein targets.

agentMeta.name: autodock
agentMeta.description: Expert molecular docking agent using AutoDock Vina for protein-ligand binding affinity prediction, virtual screening, and structure-based drug design.

agentRefs.description: Search BindingDB for measured protein-ligand binding affinities.

agentMeta.name: bindingdb
agentMeta.description: BindingDB agent for retrieving comprehensive binding affinity data for protein-ligand interactions. Provides access to local SQLite database with sub-millisecond query performance.

agentRefs.description: ChemBERTa embeddings and predictions for molecules.

agentMeta.name: chemberta
agentMeta.description: Molecular property prediction agent using ChemBERTa-2 transformer. Provides SMILES-based molecular embeddings, classification and regression fine-tuning, SMILES augmentation, confidence scoring, similarity search, and clustering.

agentRefs.description: Query ChEMBL for bioactivity, targets, and assays.

agentMeta.name: chembl
agentMeta.description: ChEMBL agent for retrieving chemical and bioactivity data from the ChEMBL database. Provides access to compound information, target data, bioactivity measurements, and cross-references with PDB structures.

agentRefs.description: Train and apply Chemprop message-passing neural networks.

agentMeta.name: chemprop
agentMeta.description: Expert agent for molecular property prediction using Chemprop v2 (D-MPNN). Trains, evaluates, and deploys message-passing neural networks for regression, classification, and multi-task molecular property prediction.

agentRefs.description: Search the COCONUT natural products database.

agentMeta.name: coconut
agentMeta.description: Agent for searching and retrieving natural product structures from the COCONUT (Collection of Open Natural Products) database. Provides access to natural product chemical data, molecular properties, and taxonomic classifications.

agentRefs.description: Run CP2K DFT and ab-initio molecular dynamics calculations.

agentMeta.name: cp2k
agentMeta.description: Expert agent for atomistic simulations using CP2K. Designs and executes DFT calculations with geometry optimization, ab initio MD, vibrational analysis, band structure, NEB, and semi-empirical methods.

agentRefs.description: Conformer-rotamer sampling with CREST.

agentMeta.name: crest
agentMeta.description: Expert agent for conformational sampling and molecular chemical space exploration using CREST 3.0 with GFN-xTB semiempirical methods.

agentRefs.description: Run GROMACS molecular dynamics simulations.

agentMeta.name: gromacs
agentMeta.description: Python code environment with Gromacs tool for high-performance molecular dynamics (MD) simulations.

agentRefs.description: Run LAMMPS classical molecular dynamics simulations.

agentMeta.name: lammps
agentMeta.description: Agent for orchestrating LAMMPS CPU tool for molecular simulations. Includes MDAnalysis, ASE, freud, and pandas for self-sufficient trajectory analysis and structure manipulation.

agentRefs.description: Janus generative molecular design.

agentMeta.name: janus
agentMeta.displayName: De Novo Molecule Generator (powered by JANUS)
agentMeta.description: De novo molecule generator wrapping the JANUS algorithm (Nigam et al., Digital Discovery 2022): a parallel-tempered SELFIES-based genetic algorithm with a DNN classifier guiding exploitation. SELFIES encoding guarantees 100% chemical validity. Accepts user-supplied fitness functions and optional custom filters (e.g. `make_pfas_filter()` for PFAS-free runs, applied as a hard post-filter). CPU-only, no bundled weights, no runtime internet.

agentRefs.description: Generative design of novel inorganic materials with MatterGen.

agentMeta.name: mattergen
agentMeta.description: Generative AI agent for inorganic crystal structure design using MatterGen (Zeni et al., Nature 2025). Generates novel, stable crystal structures unconditionally or conditioned on target properties including chemical composition, space group, band gap, magnetic density, and bulk modulus. Supports 9 pretrained models from the HuggingFace Hub.

agentRefs.description: Cheminformatics utilities for molecule manipulation and conversion.

agentMeta.name: mol-toolkit
agentMeta.description: Agent dedicated to cheminformatics.

agentRefs.description: Identify and analyze functional groups in molecules.

agentMeta.name: molecular-groups
agentMeta.description: Expert agent for identifying functional groups in molecular structures. Provides both general functional group analysis and safety screening for hazardous groups.

agentRefs.description: Run OpenMM molecular dynamics simulations.

agentMeta.name: openmm
agentMeta.description: Expert agent for GPU-accelerated molecular dynamics simulations using OpenMM. Handles PDB preparation, system building, energy minimization, equilibration, production MD, and trajectory analysis.

agentRefs.description: Run Psi4 ab-initio quantum chemistry calculations.

agentMeta.name: psi4
agentMeta.description: Python code environment with Psi4 for ab initio quantum chemistry calculations. HF, DFT, post-HF methods, SAPT, excited states, geometry optimization, frequency analysis, and thermochemistry.

agentRefs.description: Query PubChem for compounds, properties, and bioassays.

agentMeta.name: pubchem
agentMeta.description: Tool for accessing chemical information from the PubChem database using the PubChem API.

agentRefs.description: Run Quantum ESPRESSO plane-wave DFT calculations.

agentMeta.name: quantum-espresso
agentMeta.description: Python code environment with Quantum ESPRESSO for first-principles electronic structure calculations and materials modeling. Includes pymatgen, phonopy, seekpath, and ASE.

agentRefs.description: Retrosynthesis planning with RetroChimera.

agentMeta.name: retrochimera
agentMeta.description: Expert agent for retrosynthetic analysis using the RetroChimera model (Maziarz et al., 2025). Ensembles template-based and de novo models with complementary inductive biases to predict single-step retrosynthetic disconnections and multi-step synthesis routes. Pre-loaded with the Pistachio-trained checkpoint (strongest model).

samplePrompts.title: Plan a retrosynthetic route
samplePrompts.prompt: Propose a retrosynthetic route to ibuprofen using AiZynthFinder and rank the routes by estimated feasibility.
samplePrompts.expectedOutput: Ranked retrosynthetic routes with intermediates and disconnection logic.

samplePrompts.title: Dock a ligand to a target
samplePrompts.prompt: Dock ibuprofen against COX-2 (PDB 5KIR) with AutoDock and report the top binding poses with predicted affinity.
samplePrompts.expectedOutput: Ranked poses, docking scores, and key interacting residues.

samplePrompts.title: Quantum chemistry geometry optimization
samplePrompts.prompt: Optimize the geometry of caffeine at the B3LYP/6-31G* level using Psi4 and report the final energy and key bond lengths.
samplePrompts.expectedOutput: Optimized geometry, total energy, and selected geometric parameters.

samplePrompts.title: Generate a novel inorganic material
samplePrompts.prompt: Use MatterGen to propose 5 candidate crystal structures for a stable Li-ion conductor and summarize their compositions.
samplePrompts.expectedOutput: Candidate compositions, predicted structures, and stability estimates.

kits.name: chip-synthesis-timing
kits.description: Synthesize Verilog RTL and analyze timing.
kits.longDescription:
# Chip Synthesis and Timing

This starter kit allows users to synthesize Verilog RTL and analyze timing with the SKY130 or GF180MCU nodes.

**What you can do:**
- Synthesize Verilog RTL to gate-level netlist
- Perform static timing analysis (STA)
- Generate Synopsys Design Constraints (SDC) files

**Ideal for:** digital design and timing optimization.

agentRefs.description: Runs RTL synthesis based on user-supplied Verilog RTL.

agentMeta.name: rtl-yosys-syn
agentMeta.description: Open-source Verilog RTL synthesis agent powered by Yosys. Synthesizes Verilog designs to gate-level netlists targeting SKY130 or GF180MCU ASIC technology nodes. Produces netlists and synthesis reports with cell count and area statistics.

agentRefs.description: Performs static timing analysis on synthesized netlists.

agentMeta.name: opensta
agentMeta.description: Static timing analysis for gate-level Verilog netlists using OpenSTA. Supports SKY130 and GF180MCU technology nodes with built-in liberty models. Auto-generates SDC constraints when not provided by the user.

samplePrompts.title: Synthesize an RTL block
samplePrompts.prompt: Synthesize this Verilog design for SKY130 and report area, cell count, and estimated max frequency.
samplePrompts.expectedOutput: Gate-level netlist, synthesis area and cell summary, and estimated timing/Fmax report.

samplePrompts.title: Run STA on a synthesized design, with auto-generated SDC
samplePrompts.prompt: Run static timing analysis on my synthesized netlist with a 10 ns clock and show setup and hold slack for all endpoints.
samplePrompts.expectedOutput: STA report with setup and hold checks, worst negative slack (WNS), and total negative slack (TNS).

samplePrompts.title: Synthesis plus timing with user's SDC
samplePrompts.prompt: Synthesize this Verilog design for GF180MCU using my SDC constraints, then run STA and summarize the top 10 critical timing paths.
samplePrompts.expectedOutput: Synthesized netlist plus timing summary with critical paths, slack, and path delay breakdown.

samplePrompts.title: Compare timing at two clock targets
samplePrompts.prompt: Synthesize this design once at 5 ns and once at 3.3 ns clock constraints, then compare area and timing closure results.
samplePrompts.expectedOutput: Two-run comparison table including area, cell count, WNS, TNS, and timing pass/fail status.

samplePrompts.title: Diagnose setup timing violations
samplePrompts.prompt: After synthesis, run STA at 200 MHz and identify the worst setup violations with suggested RTL or constraint fixes.
samplePrompts.expectedOutput: Violation-focused STA report with worst offending paths and concrete optimization recommendations.

kits.name: life-sciences
kits.description: End-to-end life sciences workbench spanning protein structure, drug discovery, molecular simulation, omics, and literature mining.
kits.longDescription:
# Life Sciences

A comprehensive starter kit for life sciences research that combines structural biology, drug discovery, molecular dynamics, cheminformatics, omics, clinical evidence, and scientific literature mining.

**What you can do:**
- Predict protein structures and design novel binders
- Search chemical, biological, and patent databases
- Dock small molecules and run molecular dynamics simulations
- Train and apply ML models for molecular property prediction
- Analyze RNA-seq experiments and nucleotide motifs
- Mine PubMed, clinical trials, and the scientific literature

**Ideal for:** computational biologists, medicinal chemists, structural biologists, and translational research teams.

agentRefs.description: Predicts 3D protein structures from amino acid sequences.

agentMeta.name: alphafold
agentMeta.description: Agent for protein structure prediction using AlphaFold. Supports monomer and multimer folding, pLDDT and PAE quality assessment, FASTA input handling, and structure analysis for proteins and protein complexes.

agentRefs.description: Biomolecular preparation and analysis with AmberTools.

agentMeta.name: ambertools
agentMeta.description: Expert agent for biomolecular simulations using AmberTools (sander, tleap, cpptraj, antechamber).

agentRefs.description: Molecular docking of small-molecule ligands to protein targets.

agentMeta.name: autodock
agentMeta.description: Expert molecular docking agent using AutoDock Vina for protein-ligand binding affinity prediction, virtual screening, and structure-based drug design.

agentRefs.description: Search BindingDB for measured protein-ligand binding affinities.

agentMeta.name: bindingdb
agentMeta.description: BindingDB agent for retrieving comprehensive binding affinity data for protein-ligand interactions. Provides access to local SQLite database with sub-millisecond query performance.

agentRefs.description: Generative biomolecular design with Boltz.

agentMeta.name: boltzgen
agentMeta.description: Expert agent for protein binder design using the BoltzGen diffusion pipeline. Generates, folds, scores, and ranks binder designs using Boltz-2 for structure prediction and filtering.

agentRefs.description: Boltz-2 structure and affinity predictions.

agentMeta.name: boltztwo
agentMeta.description: Expert agent for biomolecular structure prediction and binding affinity estimation using Boltz-2. Predicts 3D structures of proteins, nucleic acids, small molecules, and their complexes via co-folding. Features an affinity head that estimates binder probability and pIC50 for protein-ligand and protein-protein interactions. Outputs CIF structures with per-residue confidence (pLDDT), predicted aligned error (pAE), and interface metrics (pTM, iPTM).

agentRefs.description: Query ChEMBL for bioactivity, targets, and assays.

agentMeta.name: chembl
agentMeta.description: ChEMBL agent for retrieving chemical and bioactivity data from the ChEMBL database. Provides access to compound information, target data, bioactivity measurements, and cross-references with PDB structures.

agentRefs.description: Search ClinicalTrials.gov for study metadata and outcomes.

agentMeta.name: clinical-trials
agentMeta.description: Tool for accessing clinical trial data from ClinicalTrials.gov. Access over 400,000 clinical studies from around the world.

agentRefs.description: General-purpose Python execution for custom analyses.

agentMeta.name: core-python-agent
agentMeta.description: A reusable worker agent for RDKit cheminformatics and general Python execution. Writes and runs Python scripts for molecular manipulation, 2D/3D conformer generation, chemical property calculations, and scientific computing.

agentRefs.description: Generate protein embeddings with ESM models.

agentMeta.name: esm-embed
agentMeta.description: Generate per-residue and per-sequence embeddings from protein sequences using Meta AI's ESM-2 transformer protein language models (8M to 650M parameters). Supports mean-pooled sequence embeddings, per-residue embeddings, and contact map predictions. GPU-accelerated via PyTorch + CUDA, with automatic CPU fallback.

agentRefs.description: Run GROMACS molecular dynamics simulations.

agentMeta.name: gromacs
agentMeta.description: Python code environment with Gromacs tool for high-performance molecular dynamics (MD) simulations.

agentRefs.description: Cheminformatics utilities for molecule manipulation and conversion.

agentMeta.name: mol-toolkit
agentMeta.description: Agent dedicated to cheminformatics.

agentRefs.description: Identify and analyze functional groups in molecules.

agentMeta.name: molecular-groups
agentMeta.description: Expert agent for identifying functional groups in molecular structures. Provides both general functional group analysis and safety screening for hazardous groups.

agentRefs.description: Run OpenMM molecular dynamics simulations.

agentMeta.name: openmm
agentMeta.description: Expert agent for GPU-accelerated molecular dynamics simulations using OpenMM. Handles PDB preparation, system building, energy minimization, equilibration, production MD, and trajectory analysis.

agentRefs.description: Extract structural insights from PDB entries.

agentMeta.name: pdb-insights
agentMeta.description: Advanced agent for comprehensive PDB structure analysis. Uses modern API to search RCSB PDB by UniProt ID, analyze quality metrics, biological assemblies, domain coverage, and binding partners.

agentRefs.description: Search the Protein Data Bank for structures.

agentMeta.name: pdb-search
agentMeta.description: Tool for managing and analyzing protein structure data from the RCSB PDB. Search, download, and process protein structures.

agentRefs.description: Query PubChem for compounds, properties, and bioassays.

agentMeta.name: pubchem
agentMeta.description: Tool for accessing chemical information from the PubChem database using the PubChem API.

agentRefs.description: Search PubMed for biomedical literature.

agentMeta.name: pubmed
agentMeta.description: Tool for accessing biomedical literature from PubMed. Search and download articles, citations, and full-text content using PubMed/NCBI API. Includes PMC integration for open access articles.

agentRefs.description: De novo protein design with RFdiffusion.

agentMeta.name: rfdiffusion
agentMeta.description: Expert agent for protein backbone design using the RFDiffusion denoising diffusion model. Supports unconditional generation, binder design, motif scaffolding, and symmetric oligomers.

agentRefs.description: Predict toxicity endpoints for small molecules.

agentMeta.name: toxpred
agentMeta.description: Toxicity prediction agent for chemical compounds. Predicts multiple toxicity endpoints including acute toxicity, mutagenicity, carcinogenicity, and organ-specific effects from molecular structures.

samplePrompts.title: Predict a protein structure
samplePrompts.prompt: Predict the 3D structure of human lysozyme from its amino acid sequence and summarize the predicted domains and confidence.
samplePrompts.expectedOutput: Predicted PDB structure, per-residue confidence scores, and a summary of structural features.

samplePrompts.title: Dock a ligand to a target
samplePrompts.prompt: Dock ibuprofen against COX-2 (PDB 5KIR) and report the top binding poses with predicted affinity.
samplePrompts.expectedOutput: Ranked poses, docking scores, and key interacting residues.

samplePrompts.title: Find bioactive analogs
samplePrompts.prompt: Search ChEMBL and PubChem for analogs of imatinib with measured activity against BCR-ABL and summarize potency.
samplePrompts.expectedOutput: Table of analogs with structures, IC50/Ki values, and source assays.

samplePrompts.title: Mine the literature
samplePrompts.prompt: Summarize recent PubMed publications on GLP-1 receptor agonists for cardiovascular outcomes and list ongoing clinical trials.
samplePrompts.expectedOutput: Literature summary with citations and a list of relevant clinical trials.

kits.name: physics-cfd-sim
kits.description: Simulate and analyze computational fluid dynamics (CFD) scenarios using OpenFOAM.
kits.longDescription:
# CFD Simulation

This starter kit allows users to simulate and analyze computational fluid dynamics (CFD) scenarios using OpenFOAM.

**What you can do:**
- Simulate internal pipe flow and extract pressure drop metrics
- Analyze axial fan performance using the MRF approach
- Evaluate external flow over bodies in a box domain

**Ideal for:** engineering analysis, fluid dynamics research, and performance optimization.

agentRefs.description: Runs OpenFOAM simulations based on user-supplied parameters.

agentMeta.name: openfoam
agentMeta.description: Generalizable CFD agent powered by OpenFOAM. Infers simulation scenarios from natural language prompts, maps physical parameters, executes steady-state and transient solvers, and extracts quantitative metrics (drag, pressure drop, heat transfer, etc.) reported directly in chat. Supports internal flows, external aerodynamics, heat transfer, and rotating machinery via MRF.

samplePrompts.title: Simulate pipe flow
samplePrompts.prompt: Simulate a 2-inch pipe with water flowing at 2 m/s over 5 meters and report the pressure drop.

samplePrompts.title: Analyze an axial fan
samplePrompts.prompt: Evaluate an axial fan at 3000 RPM with 2 m/s inlet velocity in air.
samplePrompts.expectedOutput: Pressure rise [Pa], torque [N.m], efficiency, mass flow [kg/s].

samplePrompts.title: Simulate external flow
samplePrompts.prompt: Simulate external flow over a body in a box domain and report velocity field statistics and forces.
